example_tasks: Compare performance of Model A vs Model B
Resize hero image to 1:1 aspect ratio
Balance budget between marketing and R&D
Map user IDs to internal database keys
Evaluate trade-offs between SQL and NoSQL
Synchronize local folder with remote server
Adjust image dimensions for social media profile
Compare features of two project management tools
Verify parity between staging and production environments
Calculate ratio of billable to non-billable hours
Standardize asset dimensions for UI library
Assess cost-benefit ratio of new software subscription
Align team goals with company objectives
Compare current workflow against proposed automation
reasoning: The icon clearly represents comparison, scaling, or equivalence. It is highly useful for tasks involving trade-offs, resizing, or mapping, but too abstract for general administrative or creative tasks.
